response:
The contributor to *Fear: 13 Stories of Suspense and Horror* born on March 15, 1953, is **Heather Graham**.

This is explicitly stated in the context:  
> "Heather Graham Pozzessere (born March 15, 1953) is a best-selling American writer, who writes primarily romance novels. She also writes under her maiden name Heather Graham as well as the pen name Shannon Drake."  

Thus, **Heather Graham** is the contributor born on March 15, 1953, to the *Fear: 13 Stories of Suspense and Horror* anthology.
